title: Simply Vanilla
description: The perfect Modpack for people who want to play Optimized Minecraft with just enough quality of life changes to highlight the vanilia feel
body:
Simply Vanilla is designed for players who want the classic vanilla Minecraft experience but with smoother performance and smart quality-of-life improvements. Everything stays true to the original feel of the game—no crazy changes, just tweaks that will help your two week Minecraft Phase last a bit longer

### **Some Features**
**3D Skin Layers** - For better looking Players

**Advancement Screenshot** - So you can take photos every time you complete an acheivement without having to lift a finger

**Bridging Mod** - To bring the ease of Bedrock bridging to Java

**Cherished Worlds** - Never accidentally delete your worlds again

**Chunks fade in** - Loading chunks now look effortless

**Completionist's Index** - For all thoose people who dont know what grass is

**Day Counter** - An immersive way to remind you how long its been since you have touched grass

**Dynamic Lights** - Light items like torches or lanterns now emit light when held

**Fast Better Grass** - To make all the grass in your world look Beutiful

**Essential** - So you can chat and play with your friends wheverer you want

**Mouse Tweaks** - Tweaks to your mouse that will make you never want to play without them

**Now Playing** - A popup that tell you what music is playing

**Icons** - Adds many decorative icons to the UI

**Many More...**

### **Performance**
Mods such as **Sodium, Concurrent Chunk Management, 
ImmediatelyFast, Lithium, 
More Culling, Noisium, 
Very Many Players, and more** help to make sure that even a tin can can Run Minecraft
